repos.description: Local AI assistant that lives in your MacBook's notch. Powered by Ollama — chat, vision, web search, and an autonomous file-system Agent Mode (beta), all on-device.
AgentFlow: A production-grade Go LLM Agent framework with layered architecture, multi-provider LLM support, memory systems, reasoning modes, and workflow engine. 生产级 Go 语言 LLM Agent 框架。
Browser automation, one binary. The simpler alternative to Playwright — no Node, no Python, no runtime. Library, CLI, MCP server, and chat UI for any AI agent.
A discipline for governing autonomous AI agents in production.
Skills ecosystem for autonomous software development

Autobots | A decentralized model agentic swarm powered by NVIDIA NIM. Orchestrating high-precision, end-to-end authenticated software development through a specialized 6-file control architecture. Features automated security auditing, non-redundant task routing, and autonomous state management.

Synchronize AI CLI configuration (rules / skills / commands / references / MCP) across 11 tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Aider, Cline, OpenCode, Continue.dev, Antigravity
ARIA - AI-driven Real-time Investment Agent. Autonomous crypto trading bot powered by multi-LLM intelligence, running on Cloudflare Workers with zero hosting costs.

An autonomous multi-agent framework designed for solving CTFd-hosted Capture The Flag competitions.  The system leverages large language models (LLMs) to analyze challenges, generate exploits, and execute them in a sandboxed environment.
🐔 An open-source, distributed AI agent farm OS. Raise, train, and trade autonomous agents on your own hardware.
Command-line interface for Declaw — security-first sandboxing for AI agents

A knowledge cycle for AI agents — one that grows with the people who shape it. Centered on the scarcity of human attention and judgment as agent capability grows; six phases keep behavior aligned with operator intent across sessions. ADRs, JSON schemas, and a dependency-free Python reference.
12-week, project-driven Obsidian curriculum: cloud/infra engineer → AI Agent/LLM engineer. Companion narrative + interview prep for shaneliuyx/agent-prep labs.
Long-term memory for AI coding assistants. Rust CLI with semantic search, Agent Skill integration, and local deployment.

A high-performance code intelligence graph for LLMs and AI agents. Sub-second structural queries, impact analysis, and cross-repo API contracts for autonomous coding workflows.
The lives you didn't live — a counterfactual life simulator powered by a swarm of LLM agents. 你没活过的人生：一群 LLM 智能体，分裂出六个走了另一条路的你。

OASiS — an open-source multi-physics and multi-code framework for verified computer simulations. Model Context Protocol (MCP) server connecting AI coding agents to 8 finite element solvers (FEniCSx, deal.II, 4C, NGSolve, scikit-fem, Kratos, DUNE-fem, FEBio) with cross-backend collation knowledge.
rust core for NPC-Context-Agent-Tool data layer, includes agent kernel, jinx executor, LLM client.

Self-hosted MCP server and coordination layer for AI agent fleets: shared memory, tasks, messaging, and session handoffs. Any agent that can make HTTP calls participates. Instances mesh together via feeds and mDNS. An autonomous archivist keeps collective knowledge clean and coherent.
A retrieval engine that reasons over document structure — not embeddings. No chunking, no top-K, no vector DB.

A reusable Go agentic platform for building LLM agents — streaming agent loop, tool registry, session storage, compaction, multi-provider LLM support (Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / Qwen), MCP integration, and lifecycle hooks.
Composable Go interfaces for running AI agent sessions
🎭♪ Figaro — a coding agent. Pronto prontissimo.
W.A.D.E. — A local-first autonomous AI runtime that runs on your hardware, owns your data, and acts without being prompted.

Experimenting with Pinecone as vector data continues to take center stage in AI-native systems. The purpose of this project is to explore the core capabilities, and better understand what is possible with Pinecone.
A functionality-first AI agent, distributed as a single Go binary.
Graph-based runtime for building, running, and debugging LLM agents in Go.
DLIA is an AI-powered Docker log monitoring agent that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to intelligently analyze container logs, detect anomalies, and provide contextual insights over time.
Rust toolkit for building LLM agent applications, e.g.: coding agents, assistant CLIs and multi-agent tools.

Ultra-frugal LLM shell for VS Code. No agentic loop. One request, one response.

High-performance Go tools for LLM Agents (MCP/CLI). 100x faster than Python. Includes native MCP Server, token-optimized search, and persistent project memory.

Govern your documents like code. MCP server that indexes .md/.docx/.html/.pdf into a SQLite knowledge graph and runs drift audits — stale policies, conflicting research claims, superseded docs, undocumented code exports. 12 MCP tools incl. cross-reference graph, governance + provenance metadata, topic similarity. Single binary, zero runtime deps.

Agentic AI Coding Platform that enables everyone to train, design and embed custom LLMs into a custom agent. Deploy your agent into the builderforce (a workforce and hiring platform). Explore skills, personnas, content, governance and workforce agents in the marketplace.

Evolving agent harnesses: a research program on how far N orchestrated calls of a small model can rival a frontier model. We evolve the harness (structure + prompts) with reflective optimizers + a verified-acceptance gate.

GoodMemory 是一个面向 AI 应用的**可插拔用户记忆层**。  它不替代： - LLM - agent framework - 向量数据库 - RAG 系统  它专注解决一个更具体的问题：  > **如何让任何 chatbox / copilot / agent / workflow assistant 在不重训模型的前提下，真正“记住用户”。**  GoodMemory 的核心不是“存更多”，而是：  - 记什么 - 何时更新 - 如何检索 - 如何压缩 - 为什么引用 - 如何删除 - 如何控制跨 agent / 跨项目 / 跨租户边界  它的本质是一个：  > **Personal Context Engine / Memory Layer for AI Apps**
